ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Courgette or zucchini, flesh and skin, raw
Swiss chard, stalk without leaves, raw
Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added

ingredients_text: Verduras 73% (calabacín, zanahoria, acelgas, cebolla y puerro), agua 25%, aceite de oliva virgen extra 2% y sal.
